name: machine-adcblock
description: Advanced ADC block configuration. Provides access to ADC hardware calibration and channel-specific settings. Obtained via ADC.block().
differences_from_cpython: Does NOT exist in CPython. MicroPython-specific ESP32 advanced ADC interface.

classes.name: ADCBlock
classes.signature: Obtained via adc.block(), not constructed directly.

methods.name: ADCBlock.connect
methods.description: Connect a pin or channel to this ADC block and return an ADC object.

classes.example:
from machine import ADC, Pin

adc = ADC(Pin(34))
block = adc.block()
block.init(bits=10)  # set 10-bit resolution

# Connect another pin
adc2 = block.connect(Pin(35))

esp32_notes: ESP32 has 2 ADC blocks: ADC1 (GPIO 32-39) and ADC2 (GPIO 0,2,4,12-15,25-27).
Changing bits affects all ADC channels on the same block.
ADC.block() returns the ADCBlock this ADC channel belongs to.
